seoTitle: Coin Grading Scale: MS-70 to Good — Sheldon Scale Explained
metaDescription: From MS-70 perfection to AG-3 About Good. Full Sheldon 70-point scale with real NGC/PCGS auction prices at every grade — and why one grade up can mean 2-5× the value.

seoTitle: All the Gold Ever Mined: 212,000 Tonnes & Where It All Is
metaDescription: ~212,000 tonnes of gold exists above ground, worth $21 trillion. 47% is jewelry, 17% sits in central bank vaults, 22% in investment bars and coins. 2026 WGC data.

seoTitle: Silver Mine Supply 2026: Where 26,000 Tonnes Come From
metaDescription: Mexico, China and Peru produce 50%+ of world silver — but 70% is a by-product of copper mining, which limits supply response to price spikes. Country-by-country data.

seoTitle: Gold in Hyperinflation: Weimar, Zimbabwe, Venezuela Data
metaDescription: Gold surged 1 trillion% in Weimar marks. But silver actually outperformed in two of three cases. Real price data and the lessons for today's investors.

seoTitle: Gold-Silver Ratio: 100-Year Historical Chart & Current Signal
metaDescription: From 15:1 in ancient times to 120:1 in 2020. The 100-year chart, key turning points, and what today's ratio signals for gold-to-silver allocation decisions.

seoTitle: Gold VAT in the EU: Which Countries Charge 0% and Which Don't
metaDescription: Investment gold is VAT-exempt in the EU — but coins aren't always included. Country-by-country breakdown, exact criteria, and the traps that trigger 20%+ VAT.

seoTitle: Bretton Woods: The $35 Gold Peg That Broke the World Economy
metaDescription: Nixon ended gold convertibility in a Sunday-night TV address. From the 1944 Bretton Woods deal to the 1971 collapse — and why it still shapes gold prices today.

seoTitle: Gold's 2024 Record Run: 40 All-Time Highs and $2,400/oz
metaDescription: Gold set 40 all-time records and crossed $2,400/oz in 2024. The three forces behind the run: central bank buying, rate pivots, and geopolitical risk — with data.

seoTitle: Which Precious Metal Is Hardest to Sell? Liquidity Ranked
metaDescription: Gold trades $130B/day with tight spreads; palladium can take days to move. Bid-ask spreads, daily volumes and real dealer markups for all four precious metals.

seoTitle: Gold vs Silver vs Platinum: Volatility Ranked with 10-Year Data
metaDescription: Silver's annualized volatility is nearly 2× gold's. Full 10-year ranking with daily max swings and worst drawdowns — essential for position sizing decisions.
